utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 headings. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided (“May 15-19, 2024”) – fully specified. 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; package only shows a local transit pass and a cost estimate for local transit (€40–€80), no flight details or flight costs – not fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs; provided name “Eco Lodge”, type, and cost “€450 (5 nights)”, but dates are 5 nights while travel_dates are 4 nights (May 15–19 is 4 nights); however the requirement is hotel selection with costs, which is present, so counts as specified. 5) activities: selected activities with costs; three activities listed with costs (some ranges or “included”) – acceptable. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs; insurance listed with cost range – acceptable. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; provided “package_cost €965–€1,075” and within budget flag, but missing a breakdown summing transportation, accommodation, activities, services; not a complete breakdown – not fully specified. Therefore, items fully specified: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services = 5. Items not fully specified: transportation, total_budget = 2. So 5/7.
